prestazioni: Engine: Replace the stock 6.4L HEMI V8 (EFI, engine code: 6.4L Apache) with a stroked 7.0L billet aluminum block (e.g., Arrington Performance 426ci stroker kit) featuring forged internals (Manley H-beam connecting rods, JE 10.5:1 pistons, and a Callies Compstar crankshaft) paired with a custom camshaft grind (e.g., Comp Cams XFI 280/286 duration with .650" lift) for optimized torque delivery in the 2,500-6,500 RPM range, supporting 850+ WHP on E85 with a ProCharger F-1X centrifugal supercharger (12 psi boost) and a custom intercooler setup (VMP Racing dual-core air-to-water intercooler with Bosch 044 fuel pumps and ID1700x injectors).

Drivetrain: Swap the stock 8HP90 8-speed automatic transmission for a reinforced ZF 8HP76 with a Level 10 torque converter (3,800 RPM stall) and a custom billet aluminum driveshaft (Mark Williams Enterprises) to handle the increased power. Upgrade the transfer case to a NV245 HD with a 4.10:1 gear ratio (Dana 60 front and Dana 70 rear axles) and ARB Air Locker differentials for extreme off-road capability, paired with a Quaife ATB helical LSD in the rear for on-road traction.

Suspension & Chassis: Replace the stock suspension with a custom long-travel coilover system (King Shocks 3.0" Remote Reservoir Coilovers with 18" of wheel travel) and a reinforced chassis (Rezvani-specific DOM 4130 chromoly steel tube frame with integrated skid plates). Add a custom sway bar delete kit (Synergy Manufacturing) for maximum articulation, paired with a hydraulic bump stop system (Fox Racing Shox) to prevent bottoming out. Upgrade to 22" Method MR701 wheels with 37" Nitto Trail Grappler M/T tires and a custom air suspension lift kit (AccuAir E-Level management) for adjustable ride height.
estetica: Aero & Body: Install a Rezvani-specific widebody kit (custom carbon fiber fenders with integrated LED light pods) paired with a Rocket Bunny-inspired front splitter and rear diffuser (both in pre-preg autoclave carbon fiber). Add a custom aluminum roof rack (Prinsu Design) with integrated RotopaX fuel/water can mounts and a rear-mounted spare tire carrier (Slee Off-Road) with a 37" tire. Replace the stock bumpers with a custom front bumper (Fab Fours Vengeance series) featuring a Warn Zeon 12-S winch and a rear bumper with a dual exhaust exit (Stainless Works 3" cat-back system with Borla Pro XS mufflers).

Lighting: Upgrade to a full LED lighting system (Baja Designs Squadron Pro LED pods for the front, Rigid Industries E-Series Pro for the rear) with a custom wiring harness (Painless Performance) and a switch panel (SPOD) for auxiliary controls. Add a custom laser light bar (Vision X XIL-SE Dual Row) mounted on the roof rack and a set of Hella 500 driving lights on the A-pillars for extreme off-road visibility.

Interior: Replace the stock interior with a full custom roll cage (Custom Cages 8-point chromoly cage with integrated harness bars) and Recaro Pole Position seats (with Schroth 6-point harnesses). Add a custom dashboard (AiM MXL2 data logger with integrated GPS and tire pressure monitoring) and a steering wheel (NRG Innovations Quick Release with a MoTeC C127 display). Upgrade the audio system with a Kicker KXA800.5 amplifier, Kicker QS654 speakers, and a JL Audio 12W7 subwoofer in a custom enclosure, paired with a Soundstream VIR-N8000 navigation system.
